creator: khera@kcilink.com
text:
after making a package of mail/postfix-current, I want to install it
on another host.  there was no way to do the equivalent of "make
replace" to update /etc/mail/mailer.conf to use postfix instead of
sendmail.

Fix: 

workaround is to run "make replace" from the ports tree on each host.
How-To-Repeat: 
	
n/a
